summary: Data Quality Layer P2 fully tested. All 32 backend tests passed. New features: DEAD TTL (4 confidence levels), MQS binary fuse for N2/N3, Exponential Backoff in Circuit Breaker. All P0+P1 regression tests passed.

minor.issue: Circuit breaker OPEN (jblanked.com API returning 401 Unauthorized). Using static fallback correctly.
RVX using FALLBACK (Yahoo Finance ^RVX delisted). Static fallback value 24.0 used correctly.

passed_tests: ✅ LKG DEAD TTL: VIX at age=6000s returns confidence=DEAD (dead_ttl=5400s)
✅ LKG DEAD TTL: Treasury at age=8000s returns confidence=DEAD (dead_ttl=7200s)
✅ LKG DEAD TTL: Gamma at age=101000s returns confidence=DEAD (dead_ttl=100800s)
✅ LKG 4 confidence levels: LIVE (within stale_ttl), STALE (between stale and dead), DEAD (past dead_ttl), FALLBACK (never had data)
✅ DEAD multiplier is 0.0 (not 0.3 like FALLBACK or 0.7 like STALE)
✅ DQS collapses when N1 source goes DEAD: VIX DEAD alone → DQS ~0.769 → DEFENSIVE
✅ DQS collapses when 2 N1 sources go DEAD: VIX+TS DEAD → DQS ~0.538 → HARD_STOP
✅ LKG_TTL_CONFIG values correct: VIX(90min), Treasury(120min), Gamma(28h)
✅ Circuit Breaker Backoff constants: base=120s, multiplier=2.0, max=900s
✅ Circuit Breaker Exponential Backoff: HALF_OPEN fail → OPEN with doubled recovery_timeout
✅ Circuit Breaker Backoff: consecutive cycles double the timeout (240→480→900 max)
✅ Circuit Breaker Backoff: success resets everything (timeout to base, cycles to 0)
✅ Circuit Breaker status shows consecutive_open_cycles and recovery_timeout_s in API
✅ MQS thresholds: max_trade_age=30s, min_buffer_size=10
✅ MQS evaluate: ws_connected=True, buffer>=10 trades, last_trade<=30s → ok=True, score=1.0
✅ MQS evaluate: ws_connected=False → ok=False with reason containing 'WebSocket desconectado'
✅ MQS evaluate: buffer<10 trades → ok=False with reason containing 'Buffer insuficiente'
✅ MQS evaluate: last_trade>30s → ok=False with reason containing 'Ultimo trade stale'
✅ MQS evaluate: multiple failures combine in reason with score=0.0
✅ MQS evaluate: partial pass gives score 0.67 (2/3 components)
✅ MQS is_ok() quick check method works correctly
✅ MQS get_status() returns evaluation results
✅ GET /api/v3/data-quality shows lkg_keys with stale_ttl and dead_ttl per source
✅ GET /api/v3/data-quality shows mqs status per symbol (MNQ, MES)
✅ Circuit breaker status in API shows consecutive_open_cycles and recovery_timeout_s
✅ V3 signal includes mqs in data_quality object
✅ V3 status = MQS_FREEZE when MQS fails (N3 frozen, DQS/N1 intact) - logic verified
✅ P0+P1 regression: LKG LIVE/STALE/FALLBACK still work
✅ P0+P1 regression: CircuitBreaker CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN still work
✅ P0+P1 regression: DataEpoch seal_epoch() still works
✅ P0+P1 regression: DQS step function still works
✅ P0+P1 regression: Pre-warm and staggered refresh still work
critical_code_review_comments: DEAD TTL correctly implemented: LKG_TTL_CONFIG has per-source stale_ttl and dead_ttl values
DEAD confidence level correctly returns multiplier 0.0 (forces DQS collapse)
Exponential backoff correctly doubles recovery_timeout on each HALF_OPEN failure (120→240→480→900 max)
Success in HALF_OPEN correctly resets: recovery_timeout→base, consecutive_open_cycles→0
MQS binary fuse correctly evaluates 3 components: ws_connected, buffer_has_trades, last_trade_fresh
MQS failure correctly freezes N3 execution while preserving DQS/N1 intact
V3 signal correctly includes mqs in data_quality object
GET /api/v3/data-quality correctly shows stale_ttl/dead_ttl per source and mqs status per symbol
All P0 (LKG, CircuitBreaker, DataEpoch, DQS) and P1 (Pre-Warm, Staggered) features still functional
seed_data_creation: None - tests use live data and synthetic unit test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Quality Layer P2 fully tested. Key new features: (1) DEAD TTL in LKG - 4 confidence levels (LIVE→STALE→DEAD→FALLBACK), DEAD multiplier=0.0 forces DQS collapse. (2) MQS binary fuse - 3 components (ws_connected, buffer>=10, last_trade<=30s), MQS fail → v3_status=MQS_FREEZE. (3) Exponential Backoff - 120→240→480→900 max, success resets everything. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_data_quality_p2.py. P0 tests: test_data_quality.py (39/39). P1 tests: test_p1_optimizations.py (22/22). Current live status: VIX/VXN/term_structure/treasury/gamma are LIVE, RVX and economic_calendar are FALLBACK. MQS: MNQ and MES both ok=True, score=1.0.

feature_verification.4 Confidence Levels: Working - LIVE, STALE, DEAD, FALLBACK all functional
feature_verification.DEAD Multiplier 0.0: Working - forces DQS collapse to DEFENSIVE/HARD_STOP
feature_verification.DQS Collapse VIX DEAD: Working - VIX DEAD alone → DQS ~0.769 → DEFENSIVE
feature_verification.Exponential Backoff Reset: Working - success resets timeout and cycles
feature_verification.MQS All Pass: Working - ok=True, score=1.0 when all 3 components pass

live_data_status.economic_calendar: FALLBACK (jblanked.com API returning 401, circuit breaker OPEN)

mocked_api_note: POST /api/signalstack/order is MOCKED (SignalStack webhook). All P2 tests use live endpoints.
